{{Infobox character
| name = Helethshan
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is an [[Archlord]] [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is a member of the [[dragon]] family.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] uses a [[Burning Cloak]] to power his movements.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
